title: Telangana HC Issues Notices on CM Revanth Reddy's Plea to Quash 2019 Poll Code Violation Cases
description: The complainants include Pulikanti Praveen Kumar, deputy executive engineer and MCC team leader; M. Narender, district survey officer; Dr P. Pentaiah of MCC-I; and Malothu Pavan Kumar, deputy executive engineer and part of MCC-IV.
